subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Scene! It is related that Alexander of Rome was a conqueror of the world and subduer of countries. And when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اکبر حکایت کنند اسکندر رومی جهانگشا بود و کشورستان و چون از
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @stories; anecdotes, @power of faith; power of the spirit
